description: Reference ranges for ml.synth.demographics. Informational only; the live values live as module-level constants in demographics.py. A drift between this file and the module is a signal that a range shift needs review.
source_notes: NHANES 2017-2020 adult survey ranges, narrowed to the population the coaching app is targeted at.

age_years.notes: Adult coaching-target population. No pediatric, no geriatric.

bmi.notes: Floor tracks WHO underweight cutoff. Ceiling caps at severe obesity; beyond that synth serves no new discovery purpose.

comorbidities.notes: Kept short so the wearables generator does not need to reason over a combinatorial product of comorbidity states.
